[Execute] Starting new retry cycle for DesignAnalystA (failure_count: 0/1)
#########################################################################
Agent:: DesignAnalystA
Input Artifacts:
  [user_task_description] # Requirements Document for 'VirtualMuseum' Web Application  ## 1. Objective Develop a comprehensive web application named 'VirtualMuseum' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables museums to manage virtual exhibitions, curate artifact collections, provide audio guides, sell visitor tickets, and host virtual events. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.  ## 2. Language The required development language for the 'VirtualMuseum' application is Python.  ## 3. Page Design  The 'VirtualMuseum' web application will consist of the following seven pages:  ### 1. Dashboard Page - **Page Title**: Museum Dashboard - **Overview**: The main hub displaying overview of exhibitions, artifacts, and navigation to all functionalities. - **Elements**:   - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.   - **ID: exhibition-summary** - Type: Div - Summary showing total exhibitions, active exhibitions count.   - **ID: artifact-catalog-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to artifact catalog page.   - **ID: exhibitions-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to exhibitions page.   - **ID: visitor-tickets-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to visitor tickets page.   - **ID: virtual-events-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to virtual events page.   - **ID: audio-guides-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to audio guides page.  ### 2. Artifact Catalog Page - **Page Title**: Artifact Catalog - **Overview**: A page displaying all artifacts with search and filter capabilities. - **Elements**:   - **ID: artifact-catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the artifact catalog page.   - **ID: artifact-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying artifacts with ID, name, period, origin, exhibition, and actions.   - **ID: search-artifact** - Type: Input - Field to search artifacts by name or ID.   - **ID: apply-artifact-filter** - Type: Button - Button to apply filters.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 3. Exhibitions Page - **Page Title**: Exhibitions - **Overview**: A page displaying all exhibitions with details and status. - **Elements**:   - **ID: exhibitions-page** - Type: Div - Container for the exhibitions page.   - **ID: exhibition-list** - Type: Table - Table displaying all exhibitions with title, type, dates, gallery, and status.   - **ID: filter-exhibition-type** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by exhibition type (Permanent, Temporary, Virtual).   - **ID: apply-exhibition-filter** - Type: Button - Button to apply exhibition filter.   - **ID: view-exhibition-button-{exhibition_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view exhibition details (each row has this button).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 4. Exhibition Details Page - **Page Title**: Exhibition Details - **Overview**: A detailed view of a specific exhibition with its artifacts. - **Elements**:   - **ID: exhibition-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the exhibition details page.   - **ID: exhibition-title** - Type: H1 - Title of the exhibition.   - **ID: exhibition-description** - Type: Div - Description of the exhibition.   - **ID: exhibition-dates** - Type: Div - Start and end dates of the exhibition.   - **ID: exhibition-artifacts** - Type: Table - Table displaying artifacts in this exhibition.   - **ID: back-to-exhibitions** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to exhibitions list.  ### 5. Visitor Tickets Page - **Page Title**: Visitor Tickets - **Overview**: A page for visitors to purchase tickets and view ticket sales. - **Elements**:   - **ID: visitor-tickets-page** - Type: Div - Container for the visitor tickets page.   - **ID: ticket-type** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select ticket type (Standard, Student, Senior, Family, VIP).   - **ID: number-of-tickets** - Type: Input (number) - Field to input number of tickets.   - **ID: purchase-ticket-button** - Type: Button - Button to purchase tickets.   - **ID: my-tickets-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying user's purchased tickets.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 6. Virtual Events Page - **Page Title**: Virtual Events - **Overview**: A page to view and manage virtual museum events like webinars and artist talks. - **Elements**:   - **ID: virtual-events-page** - Type: Div - Container for the virtual events page.   - **ID: event-list** - Type: Table - Table displaying all events with title, date, time, type, and registration status.   - **ID: register-event-button-{event_id}** - Type: Button - Button to register for an event (each row has this button).   - **ID: cancel-registration-button-{registration_id}** - Type: Button - Button to cancel registration (each row has this button).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 7. Audio Guides Page - **Page Title**: Audio Guides - **Overview**: A page to browse and access audio guides for exhibits. - **Elements**:   - **ID: audio-guides-page** - Type: Div - Container for the audio guides page.   - **ID: audio-guide-list** - Type: Table - Table displaying all audio guides with exhibit number, title, language, and duration.   - **ID: filter-language** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by language (English, Spanish, French).   - **ID: apply-language-filter** - Type: Button - Button to apply language filter.   - **ID: play-guide-button-{guide_id}** - Type: Button - Button to play audio guide (each row has this button).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ## 4. Data Storage  The 'VirtualMuseum' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:  ### 1. User Authentication Data - **File Name**: `users.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   username   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   curator_john   visitor_mary   curator_sarah   ```  ### 2. Gallery Data - **File Name**: `galleries.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   gallery_id|gallery_name|floor|capacity|theme|status   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Ancient Civilizations Hall|1|50|Ancient|Open   2|Modern Art Wing|2|30|Modern|Open   3|Science Discovery Center|3|40|Science|Renovation   ```  ### 3. Exhibition Data - **File Name**: `exhibitions.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   exhibition_id|title|description|gallery_id|exhibition_type|start_date|end_date|curator_name|created_by   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Egyptian Treasures|Ancient artifacts from Egypt|1|Permanent|2024-01-01|2025-12-31|Dr. Smith|curator_john   2|Pop Art Revolution|Contemporary pop art collection|2|Temporary|2024-11-01|2024-12-31|Lisa Chen|curator_sarah   3|Virtual Space Exploration|Online space exhibition|2|Virtual|2024-10-01|2025-03-31|Mark Johnson|curator_john   ```  ### 4. Artifact Data - **File Name**: `artifacts.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   artifact_id|artifact_name|period|origin|description|exhibition_id|storage_location|acquisition_date|added_by   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Golden Mask of Tutankhamun|Ancient|Egypt|Famous golden funeral mask|1|A-101|2020-05-15|curator_john   2|Warhol Soup Cans|Contemporary|USA|Iconic pop art piece|2|B-205|2023-08-20|curator_sarah   3|Roman Amphora|Ancient|Italy|Ancient storage vessel|1|A-103|2019-11-10|curator_john   ```  ### 5. Audio Guide Data - **File Name**: `audioguides.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   guide_id|exhibit_number|title|language|duration|script|narrator|created_by   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|101|Introduction to Egyptian Art|English|5|Welcome to the Egyptian exhibition...|James Brown|curator_john   2|101|Introducción al Arte Egipcio|Spanish|5|Bienvenido a la exhibición egipcia...|Maria Garcia|curator_john   3|205|Pop Art Explained|English|7|Pop art emerged in the 1950s...|Sarah Williams|curator_sarah   ```  ### 6. Ticket Data - **File Name**: `tickets.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   ticket_id|username|ticket_type|visit_date|visit_time|number_of_tickets|price|visitor_name|visitor_email|purchase_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|visitor_mary|Standard|2024-11-25|11:00 AM|2|30|Mary Johnson|mary@email.com|2024-11-20   2|visitor_mary|VIP|2024-12-01|1:00 PM|1|50|Mary Johnson|mary@email.com|2024-11-20   3|visitor_tom|Student|2024-11-22|9:00 AM|1|10|Tom Lee|tom@email.com|2024-11-18   ```  ### 7. Virtual Event Data - **File Name**: `events.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   event_id|title|date|time|event_type|speaker|capacity|description|created_by   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Ancient Egypt Webinar|2024-12-05|2:00 PM|Webinar|Dr. Smith|100|Deep dive into Egyptian culture|curator_john   2|Meet the Artist: Pop Art|2024-11-30|6:00 PM|Artist Talk|Andy Williams|50|Discussion with contemporary artist|curator_sarah   3|Virtual Museum Tour|2024-12-10|10:00 AM|Virtual Tour|Lisa Chen|200|Guided tour of entire museum|curator_john   ```  ### 8. Event Registration Data - **File Name**: `event_registrations.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   registration_id|event_id|username|registration_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|visitor_mary|2024-11-20   2|2|visitor_mary|2024-11-21   3|1|visitor_tom|2024-11-19   ```  ### 9. Collection Log Data - **File Name**: `collection_logs.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   log_id|artifact_id|activity_type|date|notes|condition|curator   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|Inspection|2024-11-15|Routine quarterly inspection|Excellent|curator_john   2|1|Cleaning|2024-11-16|Professional cleaning performed|Excellent|curator_john   3|2|Photography|2024-10-20|High-resolution images taken|Good|curator_sarah   4|3|Restoration|2024-09-10|Minor crack repair completed|Good|curator_john   ```  All files will be saved in the `data` directory to ensure organization and easy access. The format uses a pipe (`|`) delimiter for better readability and parsing. Different types of data will be isolated to ensure efficient data management and retrieval.
#########################################################################

[Tool_Request] DesignAnalystA: write_text_file({"filename":"design_candidate_a.md","content":"# Design Candidate for VirtualMuseum Web Application\n\n## 1. Routes and Navigation\n\n| Route Path              | Page Name            | Navigation From                          | Navigation To                                                                                  |\n|-------------------------|----------------------|----------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|\n| `/`                     | Dashboard            | Entry point (root route)                | Artifact Catalog, Exhibitions, Visitor Tickets, Virtual Events, Audio Guides                   |\n| `/artifacts`            | Artifact Catalog     | Dashboard                              | Dashboard                                                                                      |\n| `/exhibitions`          | Exhibitions          | Dashboard                              | Exhibition Details (dynamic), Dashboard                                                        |\n| `/exhibitions/{id}`     | Exhibition Details   | Exhibitions                           | Exhibitions                                                                                   |\n| `/visitor-tickets`      | Visitor Tickets      | Dashboard                              | Dashboard                                                                                      |\n| `/virtual-events`       | Virtual Events       | Dashboard                              | Dashboard                                                                                      |\n| `/audio-guides`         | Audio Guides         | Dashboard                              | Dashboard                                                                                      |\n\n## 2. Page Details\n\n### 2.1 Dashboard Page\n- Route: `/`\n- Page Title: \"Museum Dashboard\"\n- Container ID: `dashboard-page`\n- Elements:\n  - `exhibition-summary` (Div): Summary showing total exhibitions and active exhibitions count.\n  - `artifact-catalog-button` (Button): Navigates to `/artifacts`.\n  - `exhibitions-button` (Button): Navigates to `/exhibitions`.\n  - `visitor-tickets-button` (Button): Navigates to `/visitor-tickets`.\n  - `virtual-events-button` (Button): Navigates to `/virtual-events`.\n  - `audio-guides-button` (Button): Navigates to `/audio-guides`.\n\n### 2.2 Artifact Catalog Page\n- Route: `/artifacts`\n- Page Title: \"Artifact Catalog\"\n- Container ID: `artifact-catalog-page`\n- Elements:\n  - `artifact-table` (Table): Displays columns - ID, Name, Period, Origin, Exhibition, Actions (e.g. view details if needed).\n  - `search-artifact` (Input): Search field for artifact name or ID.\n  - `apply-artifact-filter` (Button): Applies search and filters.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigates back to `/`.\n\n### 2.3 Exhibitions Page\n- Route: `/exhibitions`\n- Page Title: \"Exhibitions\"\n- Container ID: `exhibitions-page`\n- Elements:\n  - `exhibition-list` (Table): Columns include title, type, dates, gallery, and status.\n  - `filter-exhibition-type` (Dropdown): Values - Permanent, Temporary, Virtual.\n  - `apply-exhibition-filter` (Button): Applies filter by exhibition type.\n  - `view-exhibition-button-{exhibition_id}` (Buttons): One per exhibition row; navigates to `/exhibitions/{exhibition_id}`.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigates back to `/`.\n\n### 2.4 Exhibition Details Page\n- Route: `/exhibitions/{id}`\n- Page Title: \"Exhibition Details\"\n- Container ID: `exhibition-details-page`\n- Elements:\n  - `exhibition-title` (H1): Title of the exhibition.\n  - `exhibition-description` (Div): Description text.\n  - `exhibition-dates` (Div): Displays start and end dates.\n  - `exhibition-artifacts` (Table): Lists artifacts in this exhibition with relevant details.\n  - `back-to-exhibitions` (Button): Navigates back to `/exhibitions`.\n\n### 2.5 Visitor Tickets Page\n- Route: `/visitor-tickets`\n- Page Title: \"Visitor Tickets\"\n- Container ID: `visitor-tickets-page`\n- Elements:\n  - `ticket-type` (Dropdown): Options - Standard, Student, Senior, Family, VIP.\n  - `number-of-tickets` (Input type=number): Number of tickets to purchase.\n  - `purchase-ticket-button` (Button): To trigger ticket purchase.\n  - `my-tickets-table` (Table): Displays user's purchased tickets.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigates back to `/`.\n\n### 2.6 Virtual Events Page\n- Route: `/virtual-events`\n- Page Title: \"Virtual Events\"\n- Container ID: `virtual-events-page`\n- Elements:\n  - `event-list` (Table): Columns - title, date, time, type, registration status.\n  - `register-event-button-{event_id}` (Button): For each event, to register.\n  - `cancel-registration-button-{registration_id}` (Button): For each registered event, to cancel registration.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigates back to `/`.\n\n### 2.7 Audio Guides Page\n- Route: `/audio-guides`\n- Page Title: \"Audio Guides\"\n- Container ID: `audio-guides-page`\n- Elements:\n  - `audio-guide-list` (Table): Columns - exhibit number, title, language, duration.\n  - `filter-language` (Dropdown): Filter options - English, Spanish, French.\n  - `apply-language-filter` (Button): Applies language filter.\n  - `play-guide-button-{guide_id}` (Button): Plays audio guide.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigates back to `/`.\n\n## 3. Data Storage\n\nAll data files are stored locally in the `data/` directory. All files use pipe (`|`) as delimiter.\n\n### 3.1 Users\n- File: `data/users.txt`\n- Fields per line: `username`\n- Notes: Stores authorized usernames.\n\n### 3.2 Galleries\n- File: `data/galleries.txt`\n- Fields: `gallery_id|gallery_name|floor|capacity|theme|status`\n\n### 3.3 Exhibitions\n- File: `data/exhibitions.txt`\n- Fields: `exhibition_id|title|description|gallery_id|exhibition_type|start_date|end_date|curator_name|created_by`\n\n### 3.4 Artifacts\n- File: `data/artifacts.txt`\n- Fields: `artifact_id|artifact_name|period|origin|description|exhibition_id|storage_location|acquisition_date|added_by`\n\n### 3.5 Audio Guides\n- File: `data/audioguides.txt`\n- Fields: `guide_id|exhibit_number|title|language|duration|script|narrator|created_by`\n\n### 3.6 Tickets\n- File: `data/tickets.txt`\n- Fields: `ticket_id|username|ticket_type|visit_date|visit_time|number_of_tickets|price|visitor_name|visitor_email|purchase_date`\n\n### 3.7 Events\n- File: `data/events.txt`\n- Fields: `event_id|title|date|time|event_type|speaker|capacity|description|created_by`\n\n### 3.8 Event Registrations\n- File: `data/event_registrations.txt`\n- Fields: `registration_id|event_id|username|registration_date`\n\n### 3.9 Collection Logs\n- File: `data/collection_logs.txt`\n- Fields: `log_id|artifact_id|activity_type|date|notes|condition|curator`\n\n## 4. Navigation Flow Summary\n\n- Starting at `/` (Dashboard), users can navigate to any main function via buttons.\n- From Exhibitions list, users can view exhibition details.\n- Back buttons return to their respective previous main pages.\n- Buttons with dynamic IDs are keyed with entity IDs for precise binding.\n\n---\n\nThis design candidate includes all required page routes, UI element IDs, navigation logic, and data file structures for full implementation of the VirtualMuseum web application as specified.\n"})

Route: `/visitor-tickets` - Page Title: "Visitor Tickets" - Container ID: `visitor-tickets-page` - Elements:   - `ticket-type` (Dropdown): Options - Standard, Student, Senior, Family, VIP.   - `number-of-tickets` (Input type=number): Number of tickets to purchase.   - `purchase-ticket-button` (Button): To trigger ticket purchase.   - `my-tickets-table` (Table): Displays user's purchased tickets.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigates back to `/`.  ### 2.6 Virtual Events Page - Route: `/virtual-events` - Page Title: "Virtual Events" - Container ID: `virtual-events-page` - Elements:   - `event-list` (Table): Columns - title, date, time, type, registration status.   - `register-event-button-{event_id}` (Button): For each event, to register.   - `cancel-registration-button-{registration_id}` (Button): For each registered event, to cancel registration.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigates back to `/`.  ### 2.7 Audio Guides Page - Route: `/audio-guides` - Page Title: "Audio Guides" - Container ID: `audio-guides-page` - Elements:   - `audio-guide-list` (Table): Columns - exhibit number, title, language, duration.   - `filter-language` (Dropdown): Filter options - English, Spanish, French.   - `apply-language-filter` (Button): Applies language filter.   - `play-guide-button-{guide_id}` (Button): Plays audio guide.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigates back to `/`.  ## 3. Navigation Flow Summary  - Starting at `/` (Dashboard), users can navigate to any main function via buttons. - From Exhibitions list, users can view exhibition details. - Back buttons return to their respective previous main pages. - Buttons with dynamic IDs are keyed with entity IDs for precise binding.  ---  This design candidate includes all required page routes, UI element IDs, navigation logic, and data file structures for full implementation of the VirtualMuseum web application as specified.

INPUT: === design_candidate_a.md ===
# Design Candidate for VirtualMuseum Web Application

## 1. Routes and Navigation

| Route Path              | Page Name            | Navigation From                          | Navigation To                                                                                  |
|-------------------------|----------------------|----------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `/`                     | Dashboard            | Entry point (root route)                | Artifact Catalog, Exhibitions, Visitor Tickets, Virtual Events, Audio Guides                   |
| `/artifacts`            | Artifact Catalog     | Dashboard                              | Dashboard                                                                                      |
| `/exhibitions`          | Exhibitions          | Dashboard                              | Exhibition Details (dynamic), Dashboard                                                        |
| `/exhibitions/{id}`     | Exhibition Details   | Exhibitions                           | Exhibitions                                                                                   |
| `/visitor-tickets`      | Visitor Tickets      | Dashboard                              | Dashboard                                                                                      |
| `/virtual-events`       | Virtual Events       | Dashboard                              | Dashboard                                                                                      |
| `/audio-guides`         | Audio Guides         | Dashboard                              | Dashboard                                                                                      |

## 2. Page Details

### 2.1 Dashboard Page
- Route: `/`
- Page Title: "Museum Dashboard"
- Container ID: `dashboard-page`
- Elements:
  - `exhibition-summary` (Div): Summary showing total exhibitions and active exhibitions count.
  - `artifact-catalog-button` (Button): Navigates to `/artifacts`.
  - `exhibitions-button` (Button): Navigates to `/exhibitions`.
  - `visitor-tickets-button` (Button): Navigates to `/visitor-tickets`.
  - `virtual-events-button` (Button): Navigates to `/virtual-events`.
  - `audio-guides-button` (Button): Navigates to `/audio-guides`.

### 2.2 Artifact Catalog Page
- Route: `/artifacts`
- Page Title: "Artifact Catalog"
- Container ID: `artifact-catalog-page`
- Elements:
  - `artifact-table` (Table): Displays columns - ID, Name, Period, Origin, Exhibition, Actions (e.g. view details if needed).
  - `search-artifact` (Input): Search field for artifact name or ID.
  - `apply-artifact-filter` (Button): Applies search and filters.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigates back to `/`.

### 2.3 Exhibitions Page
- Route: `/exhibitions`
- Page Title: "Exhibitions"
- Container ID: `exhibitions-page`
- Elements:
  - `exhibition-list` (Table): Columns include title, type, dates, gallery, and status.
  - `filter-exhibition-type` (Dropdown): Values - Permanent, Temporary, Virtual.
  - `apply-exhibition-filter` (Button): Applies filter by exhibition type.
  - `view-exhibition-button-{exhibition_id}` (Buttons): One per exhibition row; navigates to `/exhibitions/{exhibition_id}`.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigates back to `/`.

### 2.4 Exhibition Details Page
- Route: `/exhibitions/{id}`
- Page Title: "Exhibition Details"
- Container ID: `exhibition-details-page`
- Elements:
  - `exhibition-title` (H1): Title of the exhibition.
  - `exhibition-description` (Div): Description text.
  - `exhibition-dates` (Div): Displays start and end dates.
  - `exhibition-artifacts` (Table): Lists artifacts in this exhibition with relevant details.
  - `back-to-exhibitions` (Button): Navigates back to `/exhibitions`.

### 2.5 Visitor Tickets Page
- Route: `/visitor-tickets`
- Page Title: "Visitor Tickets"
- Container ID: `visitor-tickets-page`
- Elements:
  - `ticket-type` (Dropdown): Options - Standard, Student, Senior, Family, VIP.
  - `number-of-tickets` (Input type=number): Number of tickets to purchase.
  - `purchase-ticket-button` (Button): To trigger ticket purchase.
  - `my-tickets-table` (Table): Displays user's purchased tickets.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigates back to `/`.

### 2.6 Virtual Events Page
- Route: `/virtual-events`
- Page Title: "Virtual Events"
- Container ID: `virtual-events-page`
- Elements:
  - `event-list` (Table): Columns - title, date, time, type, registration status.
  - `register-event-button-{event_id}` (Button): For each event, to register.
  - `cancel-registration-button-{registration_id}` (Button): For each registered event, to cancel registration.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigates back to `/`.

### 2.7 Audio Guides Page
- Route: `/audio-guides`
- Page Title: "Audio Guides"
- Container ID: `audio-guides-page`
- Elements:
  - `audio-guide-list` (Table): Columns - exhibit number, title, language, duration.
  - `filter-language` (Dropdown): Filter options - English, Spanish, French.
  - `apply-language-filter` (Button): Applies language filter.
  - `play-guide-button-{guide_id}` (Button): Plays audio guide.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigates back to `/`.

## 3. Data Storage

All data files are stored locally in the `data/` directory. All files use pipe (`|`) as delimiter.

### 3.1 Users
- File: `data/users.txt`
- Fields per line: `username`
- Notes: Stores authorized usernames.

### 3.2 Galleries
- File: `data/galleries.txt`
- Fields: `gallery_id|gallery_name|floor|capacity|theme|status`

### 3.3 Exhibitions
- File: `data/exhibitions.txt`
- Fields: `exhibition_id|title|description|gallery_id|exhibition_type|start_date|end_date|curator_name|created_by`

### 3.4 Artifacts
- File: `data/artifacts.txt`
- Fields: `artifact_id|artifact_name|period|origin|description|exhibition_id|storage_location|acquisition_date|added_by`

### 3.5 Audio Guides
- File: `data/audioguides.txt`
- Fields: `guide_id|exhibit_number|title|language|duration|script|narrator|created_by`

### 3.6 Tickets
- File: `data/tickets.txt`
- Fields: `ticket_id|username|ticket_type|visit_date|visit_time|number_of_tickets|price|visitor_name|visitor_email|purchase_date`

### 3.7 Events
- File: `data/events.txt`
- Fields: `event_id|title|date|time|event_type|speaker|capacity|description|created_by`

### 3.8 Event Registrations
- File: `data/event_registrations.txt`
- Fields: `registration_id|event_id|username|registration_date`

### 3.9 Collection Logs
- File: `data/collection_logs.txt`
- Fields: `log_id|artifact_id|activity_type|date|notes|condition|curator`

## 4. Navigation Flow Summary

- Starting at `/` (Dashboard), users can navigate to any main function via buttons.
- From Exhibitions list, users can view exhibition details.
- Back buttons return to their respective previous main pages.
- Buttons with dynamic IDs are keyed with entity IDs for precise binding.

---

This design candidate includes all required page routes, UI element IDs, navigation logic, and data file structures for full implementation of the VirtualMuseum web application as specified.

[Tool_Request] DesignAnalystB: write_text_file({"filename":"design_candidate_b.md","content":"# VirtualMuseum Web Application - Alternative Design Candidate (Design Candidate B)\n\n---\n\n## General Overview\n\nThe VirtualMuseum app is designed as a Python-based local-web application for museum staff and visitors, managing museum exhibitions, artifacts, tickets, audio guides, events, and collections. The app uses text files stored under a `data` directory with pipe-delimited formats.\n\nUsers start at the Dashboard (home) page, which provides navigation to all core features.\n\n---\n\n# 1. Application Routes and Pages\n\n### 1. Dashboard Page\n\n- **Route:** `/dashboard`\n- **Title:** `Museum Dashboard`\n- **Container Element ID:** `dashboard-page`\n\n#### Elements:\n- `exhibition-summary` (Div): Displays total number of exhibitions and count of active (currently running) exhibitions.\n- `artifact-summary` (Div): Displays total artifact count.\n- Navigation Buttons:\n  - `artifact-catalog-button` (Button): Navigate to `/artifacts`\n  - `exhibitions-button` (Button): Navigate to `/exhibitions`\n  - `visitor-tickets-button` (Button): Navigate to `/tickets`\n  - `virtual-events-button` (Button): Navigate to `/events`\n  - `audio-guides-button` (Button): Navigate to `/audio-guides`\n\n**Navigation:** All primary features accessible via these buttons.\n\n---\n\n### 2. Artifact Catalog Page\n\n- **Route:** `/artifacts`\n- **Title:** `Artifact Catalog`\n- **Container Element ID:** `artifact-catalog-page`\n\n#### Elements:\n- `search-artifact` (Text input): Search by artifact name or ID.\n- `filter-period` (Dropdown): Filter artifacts by period (e.g., Ancient, Contemporary).\n- `filter-origin` (Dropdown): Filter artifacts by origin country/region.\n- `apply-artifact-filter` (Button): Applies the search and selected filters.\n- `artifact-table` (Table): Columns include `Artifact ID`, `Name`, `Period`, `Origin`, `Exhibition Title`, and `Actions`.\n  - **Actions Column:** Includes `view-artifact-button-{artifact_id}` (Button) to view detailed artifact info.\n- `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Returns user to `/dashboard`.\n\n**Data Usage:** Reads from `data/artifacts.txt` and cross-references `exhibitions.txt` to get exhibition titles.\n\n---\n\n### 3. Exhibitions Page\n\n- **Route:** `/exhibitions`\n- **Title:** `Exhibitions`\n- **Container Element ID:** `exhibitions-page`\n\n#### Elements:\n- `filter-exhibition-type` (Dropdown): Filter exhibitions by type: Permanent, Temporary, Virtual.\n- `filter-gallery` (Dropdown): Filter by gallery location.\n- `apply-exhibition-filter` (Button): Applies the selected filters.\n- `exhibition-list` (Table): Columns: `ID`, `Title`, `Type`, `Start Date`, `End Date`, `Gallery Name`, `Status`, and `Actions`.\n  - **Actions Column:** `view-exhibition-button-{exhibition_id}` (Button) to go to exhibition details.\n- `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Return to `/dashboard`.\n\n**Data Usage:** Reads from `data/exhibitions.txt` and `data/galleries.txt` for gallery names and statuses.\n\n---\n\n### 4. Exhibition Details Page\n\n- **Route:** `/exhibitions/{exhibition_id}`\n- **Title:** `Exhibition Details`\n- **Container Element ID:** `exhibition-details-page`\n\n#### Elements:\n- `exhibition-title` (H1): Exhibition title.\n- `exhibition-description` (Div): Detailed description text.\n- `exhibition-dates` (Div): Shows start and end dates in human-readable format.\n- `exhibition-gallery` (Div): Shows gallery name where exhibition is held.\n- `exhibition-artifacts` (Table): Lists artifacts tied to this exhibition. Columns: `Artifact ID`, `Name`, `Period`, `Origin`, `Storage Location`, `Acquisition Date`.\n- `back-to-exhibitions` (Button): Return to `/exhibitions`.\n\n**Data Usage:** Reads from `data/exhibitions.txt`, `data/artifacts.txt`, and `data/galleries.txt`.\n\n---\n\n### 5. Visitor Tickets Page\n\n- **Route:** `/tickets`\n- **Title:** `Visitor Tickets`\n- **Container Element ID:** `visitor-tickets-page`\n\n#### Elements:\n- `ticket-type` (Dropdown): Options: Standard, Student, Senior, Family, VIP.\n- `visit-date` (Date input): Date for which ticket(s) is purchased.\n- `visit-time` (Time input): Preferred visiting hour.\n- `number-of-tickets` (Number input): Quantity of tickets.\n- `visitor-name` (Text input): Name of visitor.\n- `visitor-email` (Text input): Email address.\n- `purchase-ticket-button` (Button): Executes ticket purchase.\n- `my-tickets-table` (Table): Displays tickets purchased by the current logged-in user with columns: `Ticket ID`, `Type`, `Visit Date`, `Visit Time`, `Quantity`, `Price`, and `Purchase Date`.\n- `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Return to `/dashboard`.\n\n**Data Usage:** Records and reads from `data/tickets.txt`.\n\n---\n\n### 6. Virtual Events Page\n\n- **Route:** `/events`\n- **Title:** `Virtual Events`\n- **Container Element ID:** `virtual-events-page`\n\n#### Elements:\n- `filter-event-type` (Dropdown): Filter events by type: Webinar, Artist Talk, Virtual Tour.\n- `apply-event-filter` (Button): Applies selected filters.\n- `event-list` (Table): Columns: `Event ID`, `Title`, `Date`, `Time`, `Type`, `Speaker`, `Capacity`, `Description`, `Actions`.\n  - Actions include `register-event-button-{event_id}` (Button) if user not registered.\n  - If registered, show `cancel-registration-button-{registration_id}` (Button).\n- `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Return to `/dashboard`.\n\n**Data Usage:** Reads from `data/events.txt` and `data/event_registrations.txt`.\n\n---\n\n### 7. Audio Guides Page\n\n- **Route:** `/audio-guides`\n- **Title:** `Audio Guides`\n- **Container Element ID:** `audio-guides-page`\n\n#### Elements:\n- `filter-language` (Dropdown): Filter guides by language (English, Spanish, French).\n- `apply-language-filter` (Button): Applies language filter.\n- `audio-guide-list` (Table): Columns: `Guide ID`, `Exhibit Number`, `Title`, `Language`, `Duration (min)`, `Narrator`, `Actions`.\n  - Actions column: `play-guide-button-{guide_id}` (Button) to play audio guide.\n- `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Return to `/dashboard`.\n\n**Data Usage:** Reads from `data/audioguides.txt`.\n\n---\n\n# 2. Data Storage Files and Formats\n\nAll data files are stored within `data/` directory.\n\n### 1. Users\n\n- File: `data/users.txt`\n- Format: Plain text line-separated usernames.\n- Example:\n  ```\n  curator_john\n  visitor_mary\n  curator_sarah\n  ```\n\n### 2. Galleries\n\n- File: `data/galleries.txt`\n- Format (pipe-delimited):\n  ```\n  gallery_id|gallery_name|floor|capacity|theme|status\n  ```\n- Example:\n  ```\n  1|Ancient Civilizations Hall|1|50|Ancient|Open\n  2|Modern Art Wing|2|30|Modern|Open\n  3|Science Discovery Center|3|40|Science|Renovation\n  ```\n\n### 3. Exhibitions\n\n- File: `data/exhibitions.txt`\n- Format (pipe-delimited):\n  ```\n  exhibition_id|title|description|gallery_id|exhibition_type|start_date|end_date|curator_name|created_by\n  ```\n- Example:\n  ```\n  1|Egyptian Treasures|Ancient artifacts from Egypt|1|Permanent|2024-01-01|2025-12-31|Dr. Smith|curator_john\n  2|Pop Art Revolution|Contemporary pop art collection|2|Temporary|2024-11-01|2024-12-31|Lisa Chen|curator_sarah\n  3|Virtual Space Exploration|Online space exhibition|2|Virtual|2024-10-01|2025-03-31|Mark Johnson|curator_john\n  ```\n\n### 4. Artifacts\n\n- File: `data/artifacts.txt`\n- Format (pipe-delimited):\n  ```\n  artifact_id|artifact_name|period|origin|description|exhibition_id|storage_location|acquisition_date|added_by\n  ```\n- Example:\n  ```\n  1|Golden Mask of Tutankhamun|Ancient|Egypt|Famous golden funeral mask|1|A-101|2020-05-15|curator_john\n  2|Warhol Soup Cans|Contemporary|USA|Iconic pop art piece|2|B-205|2023-08-20|curator_sarah\n  3|Roman Amphora|Ancient|Italy|Ancient storage vessel|1|A-103|2019-11-10|curator_john\n  ```\n\n### 5. Audio Guides\n\n- File: `data/audioguides.txt`\n- Format (pipe-delimited):\n  ```\n  guide_id|exhibit_number|title|language|duration|script|narrator|created_by\n  ```\n- Example:\n  ```\n  1|101|Introduction to Egyptian Art|English|5|Welcome to the Egyptian exhibition...|James Brown|curator_john\n  2|101|Introducci\u0000n al Arte Egipcio|Spanish|5|Bienvenido a la exposici\u0000n egipcia...|Maria Garcia|curator_john\n  3|205|Pop Art Explained|English|7|Pop art emerged in the 1950s...|Sarah Williams|curator_sarah\n  ```\n\n### 6. Tickets\n\n- File: `data/tickets.txt`\n- Format (pipe-delimited):\n  ```\n  ticket_id|username|ticket_type|visit_date|visit_time|number_of_tickets|price|visitor_name|visitor_email|purchase_date\n  ```\n- Example:\n  ```\n  1|visitor_mary|Standard|2024-11-25|11:00 AM|2|30|Mary Johnson|mary@email.com|2024-11-20\n  2|visitor_mary|VIP|2024-12-01|1:00 PM|1|50|Mary Johnson|mary@email.com|2024-11-20\n  3|visitor_tom|Student|2024-11-22|9:00 AM|1|10|Tom Lee|tom@email.com|2024-11-18\n  ```\n\n### 7. Virtual Events\n\n- File: `data/events.txt`\n- Format (pipe-delimited):\n  ```\n  event_id|title|date|time|event_type|speaker|capacity|description|created_by\n  ```\n- Example:\n  ```\n  1|Ancient Egypt Webinar|2024-12-05|2:00 PM|Webinar|Dr. Smith|100|Deep dive into Egyptian culture|curator_john\n  2|Meet the Artist: Pop Art|2024-11-30|6:00 PM|Artist Talk|Andy Williams|50|Discussion with contemporary artist|curator_sarah\n  3|Virtual Museum Tour|2024-12-10|10:00 AM|Virtual Tour|Lisa Chen|200|Guided tour of entire museum|curator_john\n  ```\n\n### 8. Event Registrations\n\n- File: `data/event_registrations.txt`\n- Format (pipe-delimited):\n  ```\n  registration_id|event_id|username|registration_date\n  ```\n- Example:\n  ```\n  1|1|visitor_mary|2024-11-20\n  2|2|visitor_mary|2024-11-21\n  3|1|visitor_tom|2024-11-19\n  ```\n\n### 9. Collection Logs\n\n- File: `data/collection_logs.txt`\n- Format (pipe-delimited):\n  ```\n  log_id|artifact_id|activity_type|date|notes|condition|curator\n  ```\n- Example:\n  ```\n  1|1|Inspection|2024-11-15|Routine quarterly inspection|Excellent|curator_john\n  2|1|Cleaning|2024-11-16|Professional cleaning performed|Excellent|curator_john\n  3|2|Photography|2024-10-20|High-resolution images taken|Good|curator_sarah\n  4|3|Restoration|2024-09-10|Minor crack repair completed|Good|curator_john\n  ```\n\n---\n\n# 3. Navigation and Interaction Flows\n\n- Users begin at `/dashboard`. From here, navigation buttons provide access to all main modules.\n- All detail or list pages include `back-to-dashboard` or `back-to-exhibitions` buttons.\n- Filtering and searching functionality is provided on artifact catalog, exhibitions, events, and audio guides pages.\n- Action buttons (view, register, cancel registration, play audio) are dynamically generated with unique IDs for each data item (e.g., `view-exhibition-button-2`).\n\n\n---\n\nAll page element IDs are consistent with the naming schemes described. Data files utilize pipe separators to aid parsing and robustness. The architecture supports scalability by isolating data concerns and providing clear navigation paths.\n\nThis alternative design candidate provides a complete and clear blueprint for implementing the VirtualMuseum Python web application with local text data storage and rich UI pages.\n\n---\n\n[End of Design Candidate B]\n"})

  [design_candidate_b.md] # VirtualMuseum Web Application - Alternative Design Candidate (Design Candidate B)  ---  ## General Overview  The VirtualMuseum app is designed as a Python-based local-web application for museum staff and visitors, managing museum exhibitions, artifacts, tickets, audio guides, events, and collections. The app uses text files stored under a `data` directory with pipe-delimited formats.  Users start at the Dashboard (home) page, which provides navigation to all core features.  ---  # 1. Application Routes and Pages  ### 1. Dashboard Page  - **Route:** `/dashboard` - **Title:** `Museum Dashboard` - **Container Element ID:** `dashboard-page`  #### Elements: - `exhibition-summary` (Div): Displays total number of exhibitions and count of active (currently running) exhibitions. - `artifact-summary` (Div): Displays total artifact count. - Navigation Buttons:   - `artifact-catalog-button` (Button): Navigate to `/artifacts`   - `exhibitions-button` (Button): Navigate to `/exhibitions`   - `visitor-tickets-button` (Button): Navigate to `/tickets`   - `virtual-events-button` (Button): Navigate to `/events`   - `audio-guides-button` (Button): Navigate to `/audio-guides`  **Navigation:** All primary features accessible via these buttons.  ---  ### 2. Artifact Catalog Page  - **Route:** `/artifacts` - **Title:** `Artifact Catalog` - **Container Element ID:** `artifact-catalog-page`  #### Elements: - `search-artifact` (Text input): Search by artifact name or ID. - `filter-period` (Dropdown): Filter artifacts by period (e.g., Ancient, Contemporary). - `filter-origin` (Dropdown): Filter artifacts by origin country/region. - `apply-artifact-filter` (Button): Applies the search and selected filters. - `artifact-table` (Table): Columns include `Artifact ID`, `Name`, `Period`, `Origin`, `Exhibition Title`, and `Actions`.   - **Actions Column:** Includes `view-artifact-button-{artifact_id}` (Button) to view detailed artifact info. - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Returns user to `/dashboard`.  **Data Usage:** Reads from `data/artifacts.txt` and cross-references `exhibitions.txt` to get exhibition titles.  ---  ### 3. Exhibitions Page  - **Route:** `/exhibitions` - **Title:** `Exhibitions` - **Container Element ID:** `exhibitions-page`  #### Elements: - `filter-exhibition-type` (Dropdown): Filter exhibitions by type: Permanent, Temporary, Virtual. - `filter-gallery` (Dropdown): Filter by gallery location. - `apply-exhibition-filter` (Button): Applies the selected filters. - `exhibition-list` (Table): Columns: `ID`, `Title`, `Type`, `Start Date`, `End Date`, `Gallery Name`, `Status`, and `Actions`.   - **Actions Column:** `view-exhibition-button-{exhibition_id}` (Button) to go to exhibition details. - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Return to `/dashboard`.  **Data Usage:** Reads from `data/exhibitions.txt` and `data/galleries.txt` for gallery names and statuses.  ---  ### 4. Exhibition Details Page  - **Route:** `/exhibitions/{exhibition_id}` - **Title:** `Exhibition Details` - **Container Element ID:** `exhibition-details-page`  #### Elements: - `exhibition-title` (H1): Exhibition title. - `exhibition-description` (Div): Detailed description text. - `exhibition-dates` (Div): Shows start and end dates in human-readable format. - `exhibition-gallery` (Div): Shows gallery name where exhibition is held. - `exhibition-artifacts` (Table): Lists artifacts tied to this exhibition. Columns: `Artifact ID`, `Name`, `Period`, `Origin`, `Storage Location`, `Acquisition Date`. - `back-to-exhibitions` (Button): Return to `/exhibitions`.  **Data Usage:** Reads from `data/exhibitions.txt`, `data/artifacts.txt`, and `data/galleries.txt`.  ---  ### 5. Visitor Tickets Page  - **Route:** `/tickets` - **Title:** `Visitor Tickets` - **Container Element ID:** `visitor-tickets-page`  #### Elements: - `ticket-type` (Dropdown): Options: Standard, Student, Senior, Family, VIP. - `visit-date` (Date input): Date for which ticket(s) is purchased. - `visit-time` (Time input): Preferred visiting hour. - `number-of-tickets` (Number input): Quantity of tickets. - `visitor-name` (Text input): Name of visitor. - `visitor-email` (Text input): Email address. - `purchase-ticket-button` (Button): Executes ticket purchase. - `my-tickets-table` (Table): Displays tickets purchased by the current logged-in user with columns: `Ticket ID`, `Type`, `Visit Date`, `Visit Time`, `Quantity`, `Price`, and `Purchase Date`. - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Return to `/dashboard`.  **Data Usage:** Records and reads from `data/tickets.txt`.  ---  ### 6. Virtual Events Page  - **Route:** `/events` - **Title:** `Virtual Events` - **Container Element ID:** `virtual-events-page`  #### Elements: - `filter-event-type` (Dropdown): Filter events by type: Webinar, Artist Talk, Virtual Tour. - `apply-event-filter` (Button): Applies selected filters. - `event-list` (Table): Columns: `Event ID`, `Title`, `Date`, `Time`, `Type`, `Speaker`, `Capacity`, `Description`, `Actions`.   - Actions include `register-event-button-{event_id}` (Button) if user not registered.   - If registered, show `cancel-registration-button-{registration_id}` (Button). - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Return to `/dashboard`.  **Data Usage:** Reads from `data/events.txt` and `data/event_registrations.txt`.  ---  ### 7. Audio Guides Page  - **Route:** `/audio-guides` - **Title:** `Audio Guides` - **Container Element ID:** `audio-guides-page`  #### Elements: - `filter-language` (Dropdown): Filter guides by language (English, Spanish, French). - `apply-language-filter` (Button): Applies language filter. - `audio-guide-list` (Table): Columns: `Guide ID`, `Exhibit Number`, `Title`, `Language`, `Duration (min)`, `Narrator`, `Actions`.   - Actions column: `play-guide-button-{guide_id}` (Button) to play audio guide. - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Return to `/dashboard`.  **Data Usage:** Reads from `data/audioguides.txt`.  ---  # 2. Data Storage Files and Formats  All data files are stored within `data/` directory.  ### 1. Users  - File: `data/users.txt` - Format: Plain text line-separated usernames. - Example:   ```   curator_john   visitor_mary   curator_sarah   ```  ### 2. Galleries  - File: `data/galleries.txt` - Format (pipe-delimited):   ```   gallery_id|gallery_name|floor|capacity|theme|status   ``` - Example:   ```   1|Ancient Civilizations Hall|1|50|Ancient|Open   2|Modern Art Wing|2|30|Modern|Open   3|Science Discovery Center|3|40|Science|Renovation   ```  ### 3. Exhibitions  - File: `data/exhibitions.txt` - Format (pipe-delimited):   ```   exhibition_id|title|description|gallery_id|exhibition_type|start_date|end_date|curator_name|created_by   ``` - Example:   ```   1|Egyptian Treasures|Ancient artifacts from Egypt|1|Permanent|2024-01-01|2025-12-31|Dr. Smith|curator_john   2|Pop Art Revolution|Contemporary pop art collection|2|Temporary|2024-11-01|2024-12-31|Lisa Chen|curator_sarah   3|Virtual Space Exploration|Online space exhibition|2|Virtual|2024-10-01|2025-03-31|Mark Johnson|curator_john   ```  ### 4. Artifacts  - File: `data/artifacts.txt` - Format (pipe-delimited):   ```   artifact_id|artifact_name|period|origin|description|exhibition_id|storage_location|acquisition_date|added_by   ``` - Example:   ```   1|Golden Mask of Tutankhamun|Ancient|Egypt|Famous golden funeral mask|1|A-101|2020-05-15|curator_john   2|Warhol Soup Cans|Contemporary|USA|Iconic pop art piece|2|B-205|2023-08-20|curator_sarah   3|Roman Amphora|Ancient|Italy|Ancient storage vessel|1|A-103|2019-11-10|curator_john   ```  ### 5. Audio Guides  - File: `data/audioguides.txt` - Format (pipe-delimited):   ```   guide_id|exhibit_number|title|language|duration|script|narrator|created_by   ``` - Example:   ```   1|101|Introduction to Egyptian Art|English|5|Welcome to the Egyptian exhibition...|James Brown|curator_john   2|101|Introducci␀n al Arte Egipcio|Spanish|5|Bienvenido a la exposici␀n egipcia...|Maria Garcia|curator_john   3|205|Pop Art Explained|English|7|Pop art emerged in the 1950s...|Sarah Williams|curator_sarah   ```  ### 6. Tickets  - File: `data/tickets.txt` - Format (pipe-delimited):   ```   ticket_id|username|ticket_type|visit_date|visit_time|number_of_tickets|price|visitor_name|visitor_email|purchase_date   ``` - Example:   ```   1|visitor_mary|Standard|2024-11-25|11:00 AM|2|30|Mary Johnson|mary@email.com|2024-11-20   2|visitor_mary|VIP|2024-12-01|1:00 PM|1|50|Mary Johnson|mary@email.com|2024-11-20   3|visitor_tom|Student|2024-11-22|9:00 AM|1|10|Tom Lee|tom@email.com|2024-11-18   ```  ### 7. Virtual Events  - File: `data/events.txt` - Format (pipe-delimited):   ```   event_id|title|date|time|event_type|speaker|capacity|description|created_by   ``` - Example:   ```   1|Ancient Egypt Webinar|2024-12-05|2:00 PM|Webinar|Dr. Smith|100|Deep dive into Egyptian culture|curator_john   2|Meet the Artist: Pop Art|2024-11-30|6:00 PM|Artist Talk|Andy Williams|50|Discussion with contemporary artist|curator_sarah   3|Virtual Museum Tour|2024-12-10|10:00 AM|Virtual Tour|Lisa Chen|200|Guided tour of entire museum|curator_john   ```  ### 8. Event Registrations  - File: `data/event_registrations.txt` - Format (pipe-delimited):   ```   registration_id|event_id|username|registration_date   ``` - Example:   ```   1|1|visitor_mary|2024-11-20   2|2|visitor_mary|2024-11-21   3|1|visitor_tom|2024-11-19   ```  ### 9. Collection Logs  - File: `data/collection_logs.txt` - Format (pipe-delimited):   ```   log_id|artifact_id|activity_type|date|notes|condition|curator   ``` - Example:   ```   1|1|Inspection|2024-11-15|Routine quarterly inspection|Excellent|curator_john   2|1|Cleaning|2024-11-16|Professional cleaning performed|Excellent|curator_john   3|2|Photography|2024-10-20|High-resolution images taken|Good|curator_sarah   4|3|Restoration|2024-09-10|Minor crack repair completed|Good|curator_john   ```  ---  # 3. Navigation and Interaction Flows  - Users begin at `/dashboard`. From here, navigation buttons provide access to all main modules. - All detail or list pages include `back-to-dashboard` or `back-to-exhibitions` buttons. - Filtering and searching functionality is provided on artifact catalog, exhibitions, events, and audio guides pages. - Action buttons (view, register, cancel registration, play audio) are dynamically generated with unique IDs for each data item (e.g., `view-exhibition-button-2`).   ---  All page element IDs are consistent with the naming schemes described. Data files utilize pipe separators to aid parsing and robustness. The architecture supports scalability by isolating data concerns and providing clear navigation paths. # VirtualMuseum Web Application - Alternative Design Candidate (Design Candidate B)

---

## General Overview

The VirtualMuseum app is designed as a Python-based local-web application for museum staff and visitors, managing museum exhibitions, artifacts, tickets, audio guides, events, and collections. The app uses text files stored under a `data` directory with pipe-delimited formats.

Users start at the Dashboard (home) page, which provides navigation to all core features.

---

# 1. Application Routes and Pages

### 1. Dashboard Page

- **Route:** `/dashboard`
- **Title:** `Museum Dashboard`
- **Container Element ID:** `dashboard-page`

#### Elements:
- `exhibition-summary` (Div): Displays total number of exhibitions and count of active (currently running) exhibitions.
- `artifact-summary` (Div): Displays total artifact count.
- Navigation Buttons:
  - `artifact-catalog-button` (Button): Navigate to `/artifacts`
  - `exhibitions-button` (Button): Navigate to `/exhibitions`
  - `visitor-tickets-button` (Button): Navigate to `/tickets`
  - `virtual-events-button` (Button): Navigate to `/events`
  - `audio-guides-button` (Button): Navigate to `/audio-guides`

**Navigation:** All primary features accessible via these buttons.

---

### 2. Artifact Catalog Page

- **Route:** `/artifacts`
- **Title:** `Artifact Catalog`
- **Container Element ID:** `artifact-catalog-page`

#### Elements:
- `search-artifact` (Text input): Search by artifact name or ID.
- `filter-period` (Dropdown): Filter artifacts by period (e.g., Ancient, Contemporary).
- `filter-origin` (Dropdown): Filter artifacts by origin country/region.
- `apply-artifact-filter` (Button): Applies the search and selected filters.
- `artifact-table` (Table): Columns include `Artifact ID`, `Name`, `Period`, `Origin`, `Exhibition Title`, and `Actions`.
  - **Actions Column:** Includes `view-artifact-button-{artifact_id}` (Button) to view detailed artifact info.
- `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Returns user to `/dashboard`.

**Data Usage:** Reads from `data/artifacts.txt` and cross-references `exhibitions.txt` to get exhibition titles.

---

### 3. Exhibitions Page

- **Route:** `/exhibitions`
- **Title:** `Exhibitions`
- **Container Element ID:** `exhibitions-page`

#### Elements:
- `filter-exhibition-type` (Dropdown): Filter exhibitions by type: Permanent, Temporary, Virtual.
- `filter-gallery` (Dropdown): Filter by gallery location.
- `apply-exhibition-filter` (Button): Applies the selected filters.
- `exhibition-list` (Table): Columns: `ID`, `Title`, `Type`, `Start Date`, `End Date`, `Gallery Name`, `Status`, and `Actions`.
  - **Actions Column:** `view-exhibition-button-{exhibition_id}` (Button) to go to exhibition details.
- `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Return to `/dashboard`.

**Data Usage:** Reads from `data/exhibitions.txt` and `data/galleries.txt` for gallery names and statuses.

---

### 4. Exhibition Details Page

- **Route:** `/exhibitions/{exhibition_id}`
- **Title:** `Exhibition Details`
- **Container Element ID:** `exhibition-details-page`

#### Elements:
- `exhibition-title` (H1): Exhibition title.
- `exhibition-description` (Div): Detailed description text.
- `exhibition-dates` (Div): Shows start and end dates in human-readable format.
- `exhibition-gallery` (Div): Shows gallery name where exhibition is held.
- `exhibition-artifacts` (Table): Lists artifacts tied to this exhibition. Columns: `Artifact ID`, `Name`, `Period`, `Origin`, `Storage Location`, `Acquisition Date`.
- `back-to-exhibitions` (Button): Return to `/exhibitions`.

**Data Usage:** Reads from `data/exhibitions.txt`, `data/artifacts.txt`, and `data/galleries.txt`.

---

### 5. Visitor Tickets Page

- **Route:** `/tickets`
- **Title:** `Visitor Tickets`
- **Container Element ID:** `visitor-tickets-page`

#### Elements:
- `ticket-type` (Dropdown): Options: Standard, Student, Senior, Family, VIP.
- `visit-date` (Date input): Date for which ticket(s) is purchased.
- `visit-time` (Time input): Preferred visiting hour.
- `number-of-tickets` (Number input): Quantity of tickets.
- `visitor-name` (Text input): Name of visitor.
- `visitor-email` (Text input): Email address.
- `purchase-ticket-button` (Button): Executes ticket purchase.
- `my-tickets-table` (Table): Displays tickets purchased by the current logged-in user with columns: `Ticket ID`, `Type`, `Visit Date`, `Visit Time`, `Quantity`, `Price`, and `Purchase Date`.
- `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Return to `/dashboard`.

**Data Usage:** Records and reads from `data/tickets.txt`.

---

### 6. Virtual Events Page

- **Route:** `/events`
- **Title:** `Virtual Events`
- **Container Element ID:** `virtual-events-page`

#### Elements:
- `filter-event-type` (Dropdown): Filter events by type: Webinar, Artist Talk, Virtual Tour.
- `apply-event-filter` (Button): Applies selected filters.
- `event-list` (Table): Columns: `Event ID`, `Title`, `Date`, `Time`, `Type`, `Speaker`, `Capacity`, `Description`, `Actions`.
  - Actions include `register-event-button-{event_id}` (Button) if user not registered.
  - If registered, show `cancel-registration-button-{registration_id}` (Button).
- `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Return to `/dashboard`.

**Data Usage:** Reads from `data/events.txt` and `data/event_registrations.txt`.

---

### 7. Audio Guides Page

- **Route:** `/audio-guides`
- **Title:** `Audio Guides`
- **Container Element ID:** `audio-guides-page`

#### Elements:
- `filter-language` (Dropdown): Filter guides by language (English, Spanish, French).
- `apply-language-filter` (Button): Applies language filter.
- `audio-guide-list` (Table): Columns: `Guide ID`, `Exhibit Number`, `Title`, `Language`, `Duration (min)`, `Narrator`, `Actions`.
  - Actions column: `play-guide-button-{guide_id}` (Button) to play audio guide.
- `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Return to `/dashboard`.

**Data Usage:** Reads from `data/audioguides.txt`.

---

# 2. Data Storage Files and Formats

All data files are stored within `data/` directory.

### 1. Users

- File: `data/users.txt`
- Format: Plain text line-separated usernames.
- Example:
  ```
  curator_john
  visitor_mary
  curator_sarah
  ```

### 2. Galleries

- File: `data/galleries.txt`
- Format (pipe-delimited):
  ```
  gallery_id|gallery_name|floor|capacity|theme|status
  ```
- Example:
  ```
  1|Ancient Civilizations Hall|1|50|Ancient|Open
  2|Modern Art Wing|2|30|Modern|Open
  3|Science Discovery Center|3|40|Science|Renovation
  ```

### 3. Exhibitions

- File: `data/exhibitions.txt`
- Format (pipe-delimited):
  ```
  exhibition_id|title|description|gallery_id|exhibition_type|start_date|end_date|curator_name|created_by
  ```
- Example:
  ```
  1|Egyptian Treasures|Ancient artifacts from Egypt|1|Permanent|2024-01-01|2025-12-31|Dr. Smith|curator_john
  2|Pop Art Revolution|Contemporary pop art collection|2|Temporary|2024-11-01|2024-12-31|Lisa Chen|curator_sarah
  3|Virtual Space Exploration|Online space exhibition|2|Virtual|2024-10-01|2025-03-31|Mark Johnson|curator_john
  ```

### 4. Artifacts

- File: `data/artifacts.txt`
- Format (pipe-delimited):
  ```
  artifact_id|artifact_name|period|origin|description|exhibition_id|storage_location|acquisition_date|added_by
  ```
- Example:
  ```
  1|Golden Mask of Tutankhamun|Ancient|Egypt|Famous golden funeral mask|1|A-101|2020-05-15|curator_john
  2|Warhol Soup Cans|Contemporary|USA|Iconic pop art piece|2|B-205|2023-08-20|curator_sarah
  3|Roman Amphora|Ancient|Italy|Ancient storage vessel|1|A-103|2019-11-10|curator_john
  ```

### 5. Audio Guides

- File: `data/audioguides.txt`
- Format (pipe-delimited):
  ```
  guide_id|exhibit_number|title|language|duration|script|narrator|created_by
  ```
- Example:
  ```
  1|101|Introduction to Egyptian Art|English|5|Welcome to the Egyptian exhibition...|James Brown|curator_john
  2|101|Introducci␀n al Arte Egipcio|Spanish|5|Bienvenido a la exposici␀n egipcia...|Maria Garcia|curator_john
  3|205|Pop Art Explained|English|7|Pop art emerged in the 1950s...|Sarah Williams|curator_sarah
  ```

### 6. Tickets

- File: `data/tickets.txt`
- Format (pipe-delimited):
  ```
  ticket_id|username|ticket_type|visit_date|visit_time|number_of_tickets|price|visitor_name|visitor_email|purchase_date
  ```
- Example:
  ```
  1|visitor_mary|Standard|2024-11-25|11:00 AM|2|30|Mary Johnson|mary@email.com|2024-11-20
  2|visitor_mary|VIP|2024-12-01|1:00 PM|1|50|Mary Johnson|mary@email.com|2024-11-20
  3|visitor_tom|Student|2024-11-22|9:00 AM|1|10|Tom Lee|tom@email.com|2024-11-18
  ```

### 7. Virtual Events

- File: `data/events.txt`
- Format (pipe-delimited):
  ```
  event_id|title|date|time|event_type|speaker|capacity|description|created_by
  ```
- Example:
  ```
  1|Ancient Egypt Webinar|2024-12-05|2:00 PM|Webinar|Dr. Smith|100|Deep dive into Egyptian culture|curator_john
  2|Meet the Artist: Pop Art|2024-11-30|6:00 PM|Artist Talk|Andy Williams|50|Discussion with contemporary artist|curator_sarah
  3|Virtual Museum Tour|2024-12-10|10:00 AM|Virtual Tour|Lisa Chen|200|Guided tour of entire museum|curator_john
  ```

### 8. Event Registrations

- File: `data/event_registrations.txt`
- Format (pipe-delimited):
  ```
  registration_id|event_id|username|registration_date
  ```
- Example:
  ```
  1|1|visitor_mary|2024-11-20
  2|2|visitor_mary|2024-11-21
  3|1|visitor_tom|2024-11-19
  ```

### 9. Collection Logs

- File: `data/collection_logs.txt`
- Format (pipe-delimited):
  ```
  log_id|artifact_id|activity_type|date|notes|condition|curator
  ```
- Example:
  ```
  1|1|Inspection|2024-11-15|Routine quarterly inspection|Excellent|curator_john
  2|1|Cleaning|2024-11-16|Professional cleaning performed|Excellent|curator_john
  3|2|Photography|2024-10-20|High-resolution images taken|Good|curator_sarah
  4|3|Restoration|2024-09-10|Minor crack repair completed|Good|curator_john
  ```

---

# 3. Navigation and Interaction Flows

- Users begin at `/dashboard`. From here, navigation buttons provide access to all main modules.
- All detail or list pages include `back-to-dashboard` or `back-to-exhibitions` buttons.
- Filtering and searching functionality is provided on artifact catalog, exhibitions, events, and audio guides pages.
- Action buttons (view, register, cancel registration, play audio) are dynamically generated with unique IDs for each data item (e.g., `view-exhibition-button-2`).


---

All page element IDs are consistent with the naming schemes described. Data files utilize pipe separators to aid parsing and robustness. The architecture supports scalability by isolating data concerns and providing clear navigation paths.

This alternative design candidate provides a complete and clear blueprint for implementing the VirtualMuseum Python web application with local text data storage and rich UI pages.

---

[End of Design Candidate B]
